hero_subtitle: SFTY Business consolidates fragmented provider outputs into one compliance operating layer to streamline workflows, strengthen audit trails, and improve oversight for digital asset teams.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and manual overhead when KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening results remain siloed across multiple providers. This fragmentation weakens audit trails, duplicates efforts, and complicates case management and regulatory review for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes disparate provider results, customer data, wallet risk and case actions into one unified compliance workflow that streamlines review, preserves audit evidence and supports regulatory reporting for VASPs.
workflow_title: From fragmented checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects separate provider outputs through rules, reviews, case management and evidence to build clear compliance decisions and audit-ready workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another provider. The compliance control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented vendor outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and evidence to help VASPs manage compliance vendor chaos with clearer operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing fragmented providers by preserving audit evidence and enabling enterprise deployment with controlled workflows and clearer bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance control layer that connects fragmented vendor outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and reports for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage fragmented vendor outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates outputs from multiple KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational workflow, reducing manual handoffs and improving decision consistency.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records decision logs, case history and supporting evidence to maintain an audit-ready compliance record accessible for internal and external reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is designed to connect with existing compliance tools, routing provider data into governed workflows without replacing underlying systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers and structures their outputs into audit-ready workflows rather than replacing them.
final_title: Connect fragmented provider outputs into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and case management into controlled compliance operations for VASP teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
